# jgengine-ui вЂ” capability index

Reach for these before hand-rolling. Each row is *the thing you need* в†’ *the primitive that already does it*.

## accessibility-provider вЂ” apply accessibility preferences to a subtree вЂ” text-scale CSS var, reduced-motion/high-contrast/colorblind/captions data attrs, and the colorblind color-matrix filter

- `AccessibilityProvider` (function) В· `import { AccessibilityProvider } from "@jgengine/react"`
